title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLIV. Love And Matrimony.
content:
We're all dry with drinking on't.
        We're all dry with drinking on't;
        The piper spoke to the fiddler's wife,
        And I can't sleep for thinking on't.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLIV. Love And Matrimony."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
